creator: Nakai@Mlab.t.u-tokyo.ac.jp
text:
I have ported the 'xgas', an animated simulation of an ideal gas.
Please download ,test and put it into the formal FreeBSD ports collection
or try personally.
ftp://ftp.noc.titech.ac.jp/pub/tmp/aki/in.coming/xgas.tgz
ftp://ftp.noc.titech.ac.jp/pub/tmp/aki/in.coming/xgas.tgz.README


					Yukihiro Nakai
					<Nakai@Mlab.t.u-tokyo.ac.jp>
